topic: A car has been parked across the street every night for a month and it is my car
title: A Car Has Been Parked Across the Street Every Night for a Month. It Is My Car. | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: A car has been parked across the street every night for a month. Last week I realized it is my car.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a dark residential street at night, a single car parked across the road under a streetlight, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Quiet cul de sac. I park in my own driveway. One car, one owner.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a quiet suburban cul de sac at dusk, a car in a driveway, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My car sleeps in the drive.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a car parked in a home driveway at night, dim porch light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One night an identical car sat across the road. Same model. Same dent.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an identical car parked across a dark street, matching the one in the driveway, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Mine was still in the driveway.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a driveway with a car still parked in it, seen from across the street at night, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Same plate. Same crack in the windshield.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a car license plate and a cracked windshield at night, dim streetlight, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I walked over with my keys.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a person walking across a dark street toward a parked car holding keys, only a silhouette, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My key unlocked it. My coffee cup was in the holder.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a coffee cup sitting in a car cup holder, dim interior, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each night it parks closer to my house. Now it faces my front door.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a car parked close to a house facing the front door at night, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night both cars were gone from the drive. One sat across the street, engine warm, lights on.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a car across a dark street with headlights on and faint exhaust, the driveway empty, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I sold my car the next morning.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an empty home driveway in morning light, an oil stain on the concrete, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Tonight a car is parked across the street. It is the one I sold.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a car parked across a dark street at night under a streetlight, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
